sections.paragraph:
- Original: κόμη

- Transliteration: Kome

- Phonetic: kom'-ay

- Definition:

1. hair, head of hair

- Origin: apparently from the same as G2865

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine

- Strong's: Apparently from the same as G2865; the hair of the head (locks as ornamental and thus differing from G2359 which properly denotes merely the scalp): - hair.
